name: Who Watches the Watchers
description: The Prime Directive is the core tenet guiding Starfleet in its exploration of space. But the temporal anomaly crisis has also given rise to discussions about the Directive's value - and the true motives of keeping certain societies 'in the dark'.
rules:
-- In a Voyage Event, you will engage in Voyages with ocassional Voyage Encounters that will test proficiencies of your voyage crew.
-- In this event, Gold and Silver skills for Voyages will be SEC and DIP. 
-- Voyage Encounters take place at the following points in time: 1 minute, 5 minutes, 15 minutes, 30 minutes, 45 minutes, 1 hour, 1.5 hours, 2 hours, and every 2 hours after that.
-- Passing a Voyage Encounter without losing any contests raises the multiplier for Victory Points gained in contests. Losing a contest resets this multiplier.
-- Three of the following traits are randomly chosen for each Encounter: Inspiring, Explorer, Scoundrel, Casual, Playful, Hero, Marksman, Investigator. Using crew with matching traits increases their Crit Chance in contests.
-- Using any version of Liko, Zorn, Kirk, Zhat Vash, Tal'Shiar, Obsidian Order, or Section 31 crew will provide a bonus to antimatter and a permanent multiplier to passively gained Victory Points.
-- Using the Seleya, the S.S. Eleos XII, the Borg Cube, or ships with the Ruthless trait will provide a bonus to antimatter.
-- Earn Event Victory Points passively by running a voyage, and actively by winning contests during Voyage Encounters. The amount you earn increases with every Voyage Encounter passed. 
-- Collect Event Victory Points to unlock Threshold Rewards!
-- In this event, Squadrons may also compete to advance up the Squadron leaderboards. Join a Squadron to get more rewards!
bonus_text: Bonus: Ruthless (Ship trait), Liko, Zorn, Kirk, Zhat Vash, Tal'Shiar, Obsidian Order, Section 31

featured_crew.name: Gav
featured_crew.flavor: Ambassador Gav defended the Tellarites' interests to the last and openly confronted Ambassador Sarek until he was killed by an Orion spy.

action.name: Vulcan, I Would Speak To You!

featured_crew.name: Zorn
featured_crew.flavor: Zorn intended to deceive the Federation and forced the creature to take the form of a starbase. However, this resulted in Zorn himself being kidnapped and tortured.

rewards.name: Chronitons
rewards.flavor: Chronitons allow your crew to take action in these chaotic times. Use Chronitons to replay parts of past missions via the Timeline.

rewards.name: Seska
rewards.flavor: Serving on the Val Jean as a Maquis, Seska was later revealed to be a Cardassian operative disguised as a Bajoran.

rewards.name: Training
rewards.flavor: Increases crew XP by 2500.

rewards.name: Chronitons
rewards.flavor: Chronitons allow your crew to take action in these chaotic times. Use Chronitons to replay parts of past missions via the Timeline.

rewards.name: Credits
rewards.flavor: Credits are the galaxy's standard currency. Use Credits in the Time Portal to enlist crew members, build items, and more.

rewards.name: B. Shuttle
rewards.flavor: 10 Basic Boosts. Go to Time Portal to collect!

ship.name: Borg Cube
ship.flavor: A smaller version of the Collective's ubiquitous and fearsome cubical spacecraft. Features self-repairing systems.

rewards.flavor: Use to instantly revive a failed Voyage.

rewards.flavor: Dilithium is your most valuable asset. Use Dilithium in the Time Portal to acquire valuable crew members, items, and more.

rewards.name: Honor
rewards.flavor: Honor is gained by dismissing crew who have served you well, but are ready for reassignment. Redeem in the Time Portal for exclusive crew, special fusion-related items, training programs, and more.

rewards.name: Merits
rewards.flavor: Merits can be earned by completing missions. Use Merits to acquire faction-based rewards, upgrades to your ship, and more.

rewards.name: Training
rewards.flavor: Increases crew XP by 2500.

rewards.name: Gav
rewards.flavor: Ambassador Gav defended the Tellarites' interests to the last and openly confronted Ambassador Sarek until he was killed by an Orion spy.

action.name: Vulcan, I Would Speak To You!

rewards.name: Rarity
rewards.flavor: Contains ONE of the following 5 Polestars: Common, Uncommon, Rare, Super rare, Legendary

rewards.name: Skill
rewards.flavor: Contains ONE of the following 6 Polestars: Command, Diplomacy, Security, Engineering, Science, Medicine
